name: Chinese New Years Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and butterscotch chips over hot water.
2. Add the Chinese noodles and salted Spanish peanuts to the melted mixture.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper.
4. Keep the mixture warm while spooning.
5. Chill the cookies before serving. Yield: about 4 dozen.
